Our Story

Born from Love.
Made in Lebanon.

ELL Organics is a luxury self-care brand founded by Elissa, inspired by feminine rituals, rich fragrances, and the belief that every woman deserves to glow naturally. Every product is crafted with pure botanical ingredients for real results.

Our Values
🇱🇧 Lebanon Proudly Made 🌿 100% Vegan 🐇 Cruelty-Free 🌿 Pure Botanicals ✨ Glow Guaranteed
